---
title: "ISA401 Final Project Doc"
author: "Team 10"
date: "2026-05-05"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Source 1: Census ACS Income (25-44)

# Sydney
```{r}
library(tidycensus)
library(tidyverse)

# Load the list of all available variables for 2024
v24 <- load_variables(2024, "acs1", cache = TRUE)

# Use RStudio's View to search keywords like "age", "income", or "rent"
View(v24)
Sys.getenv("CENSUS_API_KEY")

income_vars <- c(income_25_through_44 = "B19049_003")

income_2010 <- get_acs(geography = "state", variables = income_vars, year = 2010, survey = "acs1")
income_2010$year <- 2010

income_2024 <- get_acs(geography = "state", variables = income_vars, year = 2024, survey = "acs1")
income_2024$year <- 2024

income_combined <- rbind(income_2010, income_2024)
income_final <- pivot_wider(income_combined, id_cols = NAME, names_from = year, names_prefix = "income_", values_from = estimate)
```


## Source 2: Census ACS Rent Data (25-44)

# Sydney
```{r}
rent_vars = c(median_rent ="B25064_001")
rent_2010 <- get_acs(geography = "state", variables = rent_vars, year = 2010, survey = "acs1")
rent_2010$year <- 2010
rent_2024 <- get_acs(geography = "state", variables = rent_vars, year = 2024, survey = "acs1")
rent_2024$year <- 2024

rent_combined <- rbind(rent_2010, rent_2024)

rent_final <- pivot_wider(rent_combined, id_cols = NAME, names_from = year, names_prefix = "rent_", values_from = estimate)
```

## Source 3: FRED CPI Data

# Annie

## Source 4: BLS OES Wage/Employment Data

# Cam
